title: 700 Days of Battle: Us vs. the Police
original_title: ぼくたちと駐在さんの700日戦争
overview: After one of their group is caught for speeding a group of trouble-making teenagers decide to prank the local police officer. It starts with simple speeding pranks but gradually moves to more elaborate and bizarre pranks.
